<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List of peers"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/net_peerList"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the list of peers currently connected to this client.

Send a **JSON-RPC 2.0** request (`jsonrpc`, `method`, `params`, `id`) as in the example below.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["jsonrpc","method","params","id"],"properties":{"jsonrpc":{"type":"string","enum":["2.0"]},"method":{"type":"string","enum":["net_peerList"]},"params":{"type":"array","description":"Ordered JSON array of positional parameters for this method.","minItems":0,"maxItems":0,"items":{}},"id":{"oneOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"string"}],"example":1}}},"example":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"net_peerList","params":[],"id":1}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Successful JSON-RPC 2.0 response over HTTP. The return value is in `result`. On failure, nodes typically still respond with HTTP 200 and an `error` object instead of `result`.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["jsonrpc","id","result"],"properties":{"jsonrpc":{"type":"string","enum":["2.0"]},"id":{"oneOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"string"}]},"result":{"title":"connectedPeers","description":"The list of peers","type":"array"}}},"example":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":["3fd44f66 | ec2-52-15-37-171.us-east-2.compute.amazonaws.com/52.15.37.171:5050","50517861 | bootstrap14.rsk.co/54.169.136.187:5050","434f8932 | bootstrap07.rsk.co/54.169.12.15:5050"]}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
